questions.question: Explain the concept of Data Masking in Cloud Computing and its benefits. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the process, advantages, and importance of data masking in cloud security

questions.question: State three types of Cloud Data that are considered sensitive and require extra security measures. (5 marks)
questions.hint: List examples of sensitive data such as personal identifiable information, financial data, and confidential business data

questions.question: Describe the role of Cloud Access Security Broker (CASB) in assessing and managing privacy risks in cloud-based applications. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the features and functionalities of CASB, and how it helps in evaluating and mitigating privacy risks
